characters.appearance: Young East Asian male, slim build, fair complexion. He has dark hair parted in the middle and soft facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue short-sleeved collared shirt with a subtle textured pattern.
characters.demeanor: Calm, slightly melancholic initially, transitioning to a reassuring and confident vibe.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Office meetings में मुझे बहुत घबराहट होती थी। [I used to get very nervous in office meetings.]
Character A says: English अच्छी नहीं थी, इसलिए बोलने से डर लगता था। [My English wasn't good, so I was afraid to speak.]
Character A says: लगता था कुछ गलत बोल दूंगा, तो मैं चुप ही रहता था। [I thought I'd say something wrong, so I just stayed quiet.]
Character A says: फिर एक दोस्त ने मुझे Supernova के बारे में बताया। [Then a friend told me about Supernova.]
Character A says: मैंने सोचा, try करने में क्या हर्ज है? [I thought, what's the harm in trying?]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट practice शुरू की। [I started practicing for just 10 minutes daily.]
Character A says: Supernova का AI tutor बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह सिखाता है। [Supernova's AI tutor teaches just like a friend.]
Character A says: जो English असल में काम आती है, वही practice करवाई। [It made me practice the English that is actually useful at work.]
Character A says: जैसे meetings में कैसे बोलें या अपने ideas कैसे share करें। [Like how to speak in meetings or share your ideas.]
Character A says: कुछ ही हफ्तों में फर्क दिखने लगा। [In just a few weeks, I could see the difference.]
Character A says: अब मैं बिना डरे meetings में बात करता हूँ। [Now I speak in meetings without fear.]
Character A says: लोग क्या सोचेंगे, ये डर अब खत्म हो गया है। [The fear of what people will think is gone now.]
Character A says: Supernova ने सिर्फ मेरी English ही नहीं सुधारी... [Supernova didn't just improve my English...]
Character A says: मुझे confidence दिया है। [It gave me confidence.]
Character A says: अगर आप भी मेरी तरह फंसा हुआ महसूस करते हैं, तो आज ही Supernova try करें। [If you also feel stuck like me, try Supernova today.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable workplace pain point (fear of speaking English in meetings).
- Introduces Supernova as an easy, practical solution with an AI tutor.
- Delivers the emotional payoff: moving from hesitation to confidence.
- Ends with a warm, encouraging call to action.

AI tutor के साथ
काम आने वाली English
बिना डरे meetings में बात करें

आज ही Supernova try करें

- Displays the Supernova app logo and branding.
- Provides a clear call-to-action to download the app.
